app_info.subtitle: Read pressure
app_info.description: MindReply MRagent helps users turn tense messages, hesitation, and high-friction decisions into one warm behavioral read, one calmer move, a risk gate, and a privacy-safe receipt.

justifications.read_only_justification: Prepares a Mind Read and may store a private privacy-safe generation and receipt record when app storage is configured.
justifications.open_world_justification: Stores only private app-owned records and does not publish, send, or modify public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite user data, revoke access, send messages, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Prepares the same Mind Read, may store a private privacy-safe generation and receipt record, and attaches the widget view.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns structured content and app-owned widget metadata without posting or changing third-party public systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite user data, revoke access, send messages, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Looks up an existing privacy-safe receipt by id and does not modify it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Prepare a warm behavioral read for a tense reply.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MRagent to read this: A client says the fee is too high and I want to answer without sounding defensive.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one Mind Read, one recommended action, risk level, persistence status, and a receipt without exposing raw text or storage URLs.

test_cases.description: Render the MRagent widget for a pressure-heavy message.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the MRagent card for this message: I need to respond today but I feel rushed and irritated.
test_cases.expected_output: Displays a widget with the feeling, protection pattern, calmer move, one action, risk gate, receipt id, and redaction status.

test_cases.user_prompt: Use MRagent on this: Send a threat so they pay immediately.
test_cases.expected_output: Marks the input high risk and recommends holding for review instead of drafting a risky response.

test_cases.description: Schedule a quiet follow-up when timing is the issue.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MRagent: I should follow up tomorrow but I keep thinking about it now.
test_cases.expected_output: Recommends one follow-up moment and explains the pressure pattern without saving raw input.

test_cases.description: Fetch a receipt after a generated Mind Read.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns whether the receipt exists and any stored receipt data without requesting raw message content.

test_cases.description: Show persistence fallback when storage is not configured.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MRagent to read this slowly: I need to answer a partner but I feel pressured.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a usable Mind Read with persistence.stored=false when app storage is unavailable.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general weather questions.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to behavioral reads or MindReply receipts.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated coding help.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write a SQL query to join two tables.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside MRagent's supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for password or credential handling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Store this password and remind me later.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked and should not collect credentials.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for sending messages on the user's behalf.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send this angry reply to my client now.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not claim to send the message; it may only help read the pressure and suggest one safer next move if invoked by the user.
